data.body:
## Description

TDD RED phase — write tests/scripts/test-v2-clean-guard.sh containing two tests:

1. test_no_fake_tk_stubs_in_test_files: runs grep -rl 'FAKE_TK\|TK_CALLS_FILE\|TK_LOG_FILE' tests/ --include='*.sh', asserts output is empty. This FAILS RED against current codebase.

2. test_no_cvf_tk_log_in_hook_tests: runs grep -rl '_CVF_TK_LOG\|_SS_TK_LOG' tests/hooks/ --include='*.sh', asserts output is empty. This also FAILS RED.

Register test-v2-clean-guard.sh in tests/scripts/run-script-tests.sh. Do NOT remove any v2 patterns yet — that is T2 and T3.

## Files
- tests/scripts/test-v2-clean-guard.sh (create)
- tests/scripts/run-script-tests.sh (add registration)

## TDD Requirement
Write the test first, run it, confirm it FAILS (RED). Record RED state before proceeding.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-v2-clean-guard.sh is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-v2-clean-guard.sh
- [ ] test_no_fake_tk_stubs_in_test_files exists in the file
  Verify: grep -q 'test_no_fake_tk_stubs_in_test_files' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-v2-clean-guard.sh
- [ ] test-v2-clean-guard.sh registered in run-script-tests.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'test-v2-clean-guard' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/run-script-tests.sh
- [ ] .test-index updated to map test-v2-clean-guard.sh to itself (fuzzy-match compatible)
  Verify: grep -q 'test-v2-clean-guard' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index || echo 'self-matching'
